item.name: Chirwagur Loach
item.description:
An elongated wavekin capable of thriving in the briny waters of Chirwagur Lake.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: A slender cylindrical fish covered head to tail with fine grey scales. Already small, this wavekin shrinks even further when cooked whole, often leaving naught but salt-encrusted skin.
